title: アウトロー・アゲイン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since Vodka started
searching for her true goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike Daiwa Scarlet, Vodka enjoys spontaneous
action more than steadily working toward
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka worries that her childlike disposition will
never allow her to defeat strong opponents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I offer encouragement, telling her that she should
focus on what she finds cool.
